pages.raw_text:
Howard Elliott. the new president
OF the Northern Pacific. will meet
with a reception tonight between the
hours OF 9 and Q at the Hotel Spokane
that VIII demonstrate TO him the
inuck talked about sociability of the
citizens of Spokane. Preparations
have gone on for some time and
everyone in the city has become in
terested In the affair, which Is only
informal, and everyone who wishes
to see and shake hands with the new
chief Of the Northern Pacific can do
So This Is Mr.. Elliott's initial trip
and he has thoroughly enjoyed It..
Railway men consider him their
ideal. He rose from the ranks and
every honor that has been shown him
was won by diliRent service.


Every railroad man in the city is
looking forward to his arrival. many
of them being old acquaintance of
his.


The affair is In charge of the cham
Der of commerce, which body so sue
cessfully entertained ex-senator
Turner on his arrival here.
